 {"id": "ft-e34d9.10.5.4.1", "title": "[ft-e34d9.10.5.4][support] Add runtime-compat async surface guard", "description": "Add a bounded support slice for ft-e34d9.10.5.4: create a static runtime-compat surface guard integration test plus an rch-only E2E harness that verifies direct tokio async runtime primitives remain confined to runtime_compat.rs and that production call sites do not regress back to helper shims or direct tokio usage. Keep scope narrow to new guard/e2e files and structured artifact logging.", "status": "blocked", "priority": 2, "issue_type": "task", "assignee": "SilverLion", "created_at": "2026-03-07T20:53:22.939333Z", "created_by": "jemanuel", "updated_at": "2026-03-07T20:58:09.586473Z", "source_repo": ".", "compaction_level": 0, "original_size": 0, "labels": ["asupersync", "contracts", "e2e-tests", "quality-gate", "test-coverage", "test-logging", "vendored"], "dependencies": [{"issue_id": "ft-e34d9.10.5.4.1", "depends_on_id": "ft-e34d9.10.5.4", "type": "parent-child", "created_at": "2026-03-07T20:53:22.939333Z", "created_by": "jemanuel", "metadata": "{}", "thread_id": ""}], "comments": [{"id": 1984, "issue_id": "ft-e34d9.10.5.4.1", "author": "Jeff Emanuel", "text": "Implemented bounded support slice: added crates/frankenterm-core/tests/runtime_compat_surface_guard.rs plus tests/e2e/test_ft_e34d9_10_5_4_runtime_surface_guard.sh. The new guard test statically enforces that direct tokio async runtime primitives stay confined to runtime_compat.rs, production call sites do not regress to runtime_compat helper shims, and web/main runtime coordination continues to route through runtime_compat bridges. Local non-cargo validation passed: rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/frankenterm-core/tests/runtime_compat_surface_guard.rs; bash -n tests/e2e/test_ft_e34d9_10_5_4_runtime_surface_guard.sh; git diff --check on both new files. Ran the new E2E harness directly: scenarios 1-4 (static allowlist/failure-injection/recovery/helper-scan) passed, then the script exited intentionally at rch preflight because rch workers probe --all found no reachable remote workers and refused local cargo fallback. Artifact/log roots: tests/e2e/logs and tests/e2e/artifacts/ft_e34d9_10_5_4_runtime_surface_guard. Remaining blocker is compliant remote cargo execution for runtime_compat_surface_guard + runtime_compat_smoke.", "created_at": "2026-03-07T20:57:15Z"}, {"id": 1985, "issue_id": "ft-e34d9.10.5.4.1", "author": "Jeff Emanuel", "text": "Follow-up validation note: the harness blocker is confirmed, not just inferred. {

Scope:
- LabRuntime deterministic suites
- DPOR/failure injection
- full-stack integration + e2e evidence packs

## Acceptance Criteria
1. Implement the full scope described in this bead Objective/Details/Goals with no functional regressions in adjacent behavior.
2. Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge/boundary conditions, and explicit error/failure paths for the touched logic.
3. Add integration/E2E scenario scripts that validate real workflow behavior end-to-end, including at least one failure-injection path and one recovery path.
4. Ensure E2E scenarios emit detailed structured logs (timestamp, component, correlation_id, scenario_id, input, decision/outcome, reason_code/error_code) and retain artifacts for triage.
5. Validate determinism and policy/safety constraints for this change, including repeat-run stability and contract-level assertions on touched interfaces.
6. Wire new/updated tests into the project test workflow and document exact execution commands/log locations in implementation notes.

## User Impact
1. Specify the concrete operator/agent workflow pain this bead removes (speed, reliability, safety, or clarity).
2. Define measurable user-facing outcomes (for example p95 latency, failure/timeout rate, time-to-recovery, or reduction in manual intervention steps).
